name: water_allocation
description: a reservoir water-allocation world across users; actions release, ration, refill

card.description: a reservoir water-allocation world across users; actions release, ration, refill

rules: 'release' delivers each user's allocation x ration_factor out of the reservoir; if total demand exceeds stored water, deliveries scale down proportionally and the unmet amount becomes 'shortfall'.
'ration' sets the global ration_factor, clamped to [0, 1], to conserve water.
'refill' adds inflow (params 'amount', default = expected inflow) to the reservoir, never exceeding capacity.
The reservoir is conserved: water leaves only via release and enters only via refill.

emit.report: cycle {cycle}: reservoir {reservoir} (ration x{ration_factor}); delivered farms={recv_farms} city={recv_city} industry={recv_industry}; shortfall {shortfall}
